title: alaticaulia munae
side_effects: Alaticaulia munae can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and stomach upset in some individuals. In rare cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's extract can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. Excessive consumption of the plant's leaves or roots can also lead to liver damage and kidney impairment. Furthermore, using Alaticaulia munae as a treatment for certain health conditions without proper medical supervision can exacerbate underlying conditions, such as hypertension and heart disease.
